snippet.description:

Zbog ƒНega se film pre zvaniƒНne bioskopske premijere u Srbiji zakazane za 22. april kada se obele≈Њava 76 godina od proboja poslednjih zarobljenika iz logora Jasenovac, prikazuje na televiziji? U kojoj meri su negativni prikazi bili opreteƒЗenje za film u kontekstu trke za oskarovsku nominaciju? Zbog ƒНega "Dara iz Jasenovca" izaziva reakcije i napade onih koji relativizuju zloƒНine? Pored reditelja, u specijalu govore scenaristkinja Nata≈°a DrakuliƒЗ, glumci Biljana ƒМekiƒЗ, Marko JanketiƒЗ, Igor ƒРorƒСeviƒЗ, Nikolina FreganoviƒЗ, Anja StaniƒЗ IliƒЗ, scenograf Goran JoksimoviƒЗ, kompozitori Aleksandra KovaƒН i Roman Gor≈°ek.

snippet.title: Watch NASAвАЩs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover вАУ the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space вАУ search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASAвАЩs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: RIJEKA vs HAJDUK 0:1 (23.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
U novom Jadranskom derbiju, susretu 23. kola HT Prve lige, Hajduk je s 1:0 pobijedio Rijeku na Rujevici.

Posljednja liga≈°ka utakmica Hajduka bila je ona prije dva i pol tjedna ba≈° na Rujevici, a i tada su SpliƒЗani slavili s minimalnih 1:0 (zaostali susret).

No, ovaj put je Hajduk ostavio mnogo bolji dojam, a u premijeri je Marko Livaja pokazao kako ƒЗe biti veliko pojaƒНanje Hajduka. Mnogo toga je pokazao i KaƒНanikliƒЗ, takoƒСer novi igraƒН na Poljudu, koji je u≈°ao u igru u drugom poluvremenu.

Igralo se otvoreno s obje strane, no Hajduk je kao rijetko kada ove sezone djelovao vrlo organizirano i konkretno. Livaja je bio sjajan u igri prema naprijed, dok je dva gola Umuta Nayira poni≈°tio VAR. No, u 73. minuti je TurƒНin zabio i treƒЗi put, na odliƒНnu asistenciju Livaje, ≈°to je bio gol odluke.

Rijeka je potom nasrnula na suparnika i u 96. minuti dobila idealnu priliku za izjednaƒНenje. Andrija≈°eviƒЗ je izveo jedanaesterac, ali je KaliniƒЗ obranio i saƒНuvao Hajduku tri boda.

Hajduk je Rijeci do≈°ao na samo tri boda zaostatka, a ima i odigranu utakmicu manje.

HT Prva liga, 23. kolo: Rijeka - Hajduk 0:1 (Umut Nayir 73.)

snippet.title: Vladika Porfirije pjeva ƒНetniƒНke pjesme
snippet.description:
Novi patrijarh SPC-a Porfirije, do danas mitropolit zagrebaƒНko-ljubljanski osvanuo je prije pet godina na video snimku, kako u zanimljivom dru≈°tvu pjeva ƒНetniƒНku pjesmu posveƒЗenu ƒНetniƒНkom vojvodi MomƒНilu ƒРujiƒЗu, ratnom zloƒНincu iz Drugog svjetskog rata.

Snimak je navodno nastao prije pet godina u Chicagu.

- Nakon liturgije bio je ruƒНak i zabava, rekao sam Voji Bilbiji da otpjeva "na≈°u pjesmu", misleƒЗi na "Tamo daleko". On je poƒНeo pjevati pjesmu koju i ne znam i nekako sam pjevu≈°io za njima, malo iznenaƒСen ≈°to nije zapjevao onu koju sam mislio, pa sam u jednom trenutku i za≈°utio - pravdao se Porfirije u hrvatskim medijima rekav≈°i da je za≈°utio kada se pjevalo o "kokardi vojvode ƒРujiƒЗa".

Iz snimke se jasno vidi da je PeriƒЗ velik dio pjesme zaista opjevao, a veƒЗ od poƒНetka same pjesme jasno je da se radi o pjesmi ratne tematike s obzirom da se spominju "mitraljesci" i "granate".

- ≈†ta se ono na Dinari sjaji, ƒРujiƒЗeva kokarda na glavi - ka≈Њe sporni stih, a te≈°ko je procijeniti je li Porfirije zaista, kako tvrdi, prestao pjevati.

Pop MomƒНilo ƒРujiƒЗ ƒНetniƒНki je vojvoda i ratni zloƒНinac odgovoran za neke od najgnusnijih zloƒНina na ovim podruƒНjima u Drugom svjetskom ratu. ƒРujiƒЗevi ƒНetnici jedan od najveƒЗih pokolja napravili su u selu Gata u zaleƒСu Omi≈°a kada su 1.oktobra 1942. godine zvjerski poklali 95 civila.

snippet.title: Perseverance RoverвАЩs Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

snippet.title: Yemin 316. B√ґl√Љm | The Promise Season 3 Episode 316
snippet.description:
Yemin 316. B√ґl√Љm √Цzeti:

YiƒЯit i√Іin konakta kalmayƒ± kabul etse de Feride hen√Љz EmirвАЩi affedebilmi≈Я deƒЯildir. Ya≈Яadƒ±klarƒ±nƒ± bir t√Љrl√Љ unutamayan Feride EmirвАЩe kar≈Яƒ± √Іok aƒЯƒ±r konu≈Яur. Feride ile Emir bu √Іƒ±kmazƒ±n i√Іinde daha ne kadar kalacaklar. √Цte yandan Cavidan, TalazвАЩƒ±n takibi sƒ±rasƒ±nda kaza ge√Іirir. Cavidan √ґl√Љm ile burun buruna gelmi≈Яtir. D√ЉƒЯ√Љn arifesinde hi√Іbir aksilik √Іƒ±kmamƒ±≈Яtƒ±r ve iki a≈Яƒ±k sonunda muratlarƒ±na ererler. Bundan sonra onlarƒ± Narin ile KemalвАЩi mutlu g√Љnler beklemektedir.

When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. He travels to see Reyhan, the daughter of an old family friend. She is a kind and caring girl and Hikmet has her promise to marry Emir, securing a stable future for the family. But Emir makes his own promise - to punish his father for controlling his life he will treat Reyhan so badly that she is forced to leave him.

#Yemin
#ThePromise

snippet.title: Realistican dan u 7-om mjesecu trudnoce
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32вАЩ to tie at one and added two more in the 65вАЩ and 85вАЩ. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70вАЩ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27вАЩ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

snippet.title: Plazma torta sa milka ƒНokoladom, pojela se odmah pa sam ponovo pravila da bih vam uslikala presek.
snippet.description:
Nisam se nadala da ƒЗe u roku od pola sata ,,nestati"ove torte i da ƒЗu ostati bez preseka i slike (a bez toga vam ne mogu pustiti recept)..tako da sam je opet pravila, ≈°to je mojima savr≈°eno odgovaralo :)
Torta sa plazma keksom, milka ƒНokoladom i le≈°nicima. Odmah se pojela bez obzira ≈°to spada u one torte kojih je dovoljno jedno parƒНe. Korice su lagane od belanaca (nisu su≈°ene) i plazma keksa.
#milkatorta #plazmatorta #roƒСendansketorte
sveƒНane torte
torte sa korama
Recepte mo≈Њete ƒНitati na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/02/plazma-torta-sa-milka-cokoladom.html


Sastojci i priprema:
Kora:

- 5 belanaca
- 5 ka≈°ika ≈°eƒЗera
- 1,5 ka≈°ika bra≈°na
- 5 ka≈°ika mlevene plazme

3 - 4 ka≈°ike vode ili mleka za prelivanje peƒНenih kora

Prave se ovakve 3 kore.

Umutiti belanca i ≈°eƒЗer u ƒНvrst sneg. Ume≈°ati bra≈°no i plazmu. PeƒЗi u zagrejanoj rerni na 180 stepeni do 20 minuta. PeƒНene kore premazati vodom ili mlekom, 3-4 ka≈°ike je dovoljno.

Fil:

- 15 ≈Њumanaca
- 150 gr. ≈°eƒЗera
- 200 gr. maslaca ili margarina
- 100 gr. crne milka ƒНokolade
- 100 gr. bele milka ƒНokolade
- 200 gr. mlevene plazme
- 100 gr. mlevenih le≈°nika (lep≈°e ako su predhodno peƒНeni)
- 300 ml. slatke pavlake

Umutiti ≈Њumanca sa ≈°eƒЗerom i kuvati na pari uz neprestano me≈°anje, oko 10 minuta.
Ostaviti da se ohladi. Za to vreme rastopiti ƒНokolade, umutiti maslac i slatku pavlaku.
U fil mikserom ume≈°ati maslac i ƒНetiri pune ka≈°ike slatke pavlake.
Ume≈°ati le≈°nike i plazma keks. Podeliti fil na dva dela, u jedna deo staviti rastopljenu tamnu ƒНokoladu u drugi deo rastopljenu belu ƒНokoladu.

Na tacnu staviti kalup i u njemu filovati tortu.
Kora, tamniji fil, slatka pavlaka, kora, svetliji fil, slatka pavlaka, kora. Odozgo izme≈°ati ostatake filova, uvek ostavim ka≈°iku-dve fila i malo slatke pavlake. To mi bude fil s kojim prema≈Њem treƒЗu koru. 
Mo≈Њete ukrasiti ≈°lagom ili rastopljenom ƒНokoladom.
Torta mora da odstoji jedna dan u fri≈Њideru pa tek onda seƒЗi i poslu≈Њiti.
Prijatno!

en.title: Cake with milk chocolate and ground biscuits, the best cake ever!
en.description:
#cake #chocolate #recipes
Ingredients and preparation:

Biscuit:
- 5 egg whites
- 5 tablespoons of sugar
- 1.5 tablespoons of flour
- 5 tablespoons ground biscuits

3-4 tablespoons of water or milk for topping baked biscuits

Prepare three biscuits.

Whisk egg whites and sugar. Stir in flour and ground biscuits. Bake in a preheated oven at 180 degrees for up to 20 minutes. Coat the baked biscuits with water or milk, 3-4 tablespoons is enough.

Cream:

- 15 egg yolks
- 150 gr. sugar
- 200 gr. butter or margarine
- 100 gr. dark milka chocolate
- 100 gr. white milk chocolate
- 200 gr. ground biscuits
- 100 gr. hazelnuts (better if pre-baked)
- 300 ml. whipped cream

Whisk the egg yolks with the sugar and cook on a steamer with a constant question, about 10 minutes.
Allow to cool. Meanwhile, melt the chocolate, whisk the butter. Whip the whipped cream.
Add 4 tablespoons of whipped cream to the filling, whisk.
Stir in hazelnuts and biscuits. Divide the filling into two parts, put melted dark chocolate in one part and melted white chocolate in the other part.

Fill the cake.
Biscuit, darker filling, whipped cream, biscuit, lighter filling, whipped cream, crust. Mix the rest of the fillings on top, I always leave a spoonful or two of filling and a little sweet sour cream. This is my filling with which I coat the third biscuit.
You can decorate with whipped cream or melted chocolate.
The cake must stand for one day in the refrigerator, cut and serve.
Enjoy !
